varietyZero: Engine always plays the strongest move
varietyDesc: Higher values make moves less predictable but not always optimal
armageddonActive: Engine will play aggressively to avoid draws
armageddonDesc: Enable to force wins — draws count as losses
unlockFullStrengthDesc: Unlock maximum engine strength at 3500 ELO
upgradePremiumMaia: Upgrade to premium to use Maia engine
launchMaiaApp: Launch the Chessr Maia app to connect
rapidDesc: Trained on rapid games — more thoughtful, positional play
blitzDesc: Trained on blitz games — faster, more intuitive decisions
personalityEngineDesc: Plays like an engine with minimal errors.
personalityAggressiveDesc: Attacks relentlessly, prefers active pieces, biased toward Queen play.
personalityDefensiveDesc: Emphasizes king safety and solid position above all.
personalityActiveDesc: Tends toward open positions and well-placed pieces.
personalityPositionalDesc: Solid play, maneuvering, more closed positions.
personalityEndgameDesc: Prefers playing through to win by promoting a pawn.
personalityBeginnerDesc: Doesn't understand fundamentals, looks to check and capture.
personalityHumanDesc: Optimized to play like strong human players.
ambitionDrawSeekerDesc: Actively seeks draws at all costs
